chunks.text: IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI Crl. Bail Application No. 2431 of 2023 Applicant: Ali Mardan Magsi through Mr. Asadullah Burdi, Advocate along with applicant Respondent: The State through Mr. Muhammad Iqbal Awan, Addl.P.G. along with SIP Tariq Javed Date of hearing: 20th November, 2023 ORDER Omar Sial, J: Ali Mardan Magsi has sought pre-arrest bail in crime number 158 of 2022 registered under sections 147, 148, 149, 353, 324 and 186 P.P.C. at the Gulshan-e-Maymar police station. His earlier bail plea was dismissed by the learned 2nd Additional Sessions Judge, Karachi West on 07.05.2022. 2. Facts of the F.I.R. are not being reproduced as the sole ground raised by the applicant’s counsel is that of consistency. Ahmed Shah Syed, a co-accused, with exactly the same allegations was granted pre-arrest bail by this court on 08.03.2023. No application from the State seeking cancellation of that bail has been filed nor has it been reported that Ahmed Shah misused the concession. There is no complaint that the applicant has not co-operated with the investigation. The learned Additional Prosecutor General confirms the foregoing. 3. On the ground of consistency, the interim pre-arrest bail granted to Ali Mardan Magsi is confirmed on the same terms and conditions. JUDGE
